steps.title: Identify the linear scale factor
steps.content: Each side of parallelogram PQRS is 2 times the corresponding side of ABCD. The linear scale factor is $k = 2$.

steps.title: Apply area scaling for similar figures
steps.content:
When similar figures have a linear scale factor of $k$, their areas scale by $k^2$. Multiply the original area by the area scale factor:
$$5 \times 2^2 = 5 \times 4 = 20 \text{ cm}^2$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
